fixes_applied.reason: T031 ARR1 KO predicted decreased but biology says increased
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Per E014 mechanism: Type-B ARR1 is a negative regulator of branching; arr1 mutant has increased branching (Nguyen-Emery 2017 review)

fixes_applied.reason: Modifier 1.0 = WT, not OE. GOF should be 2.0
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Standard OE encoding per BUILDER spec

fixes_applied.reason: Treatment should push environmental input above baseline

fixes_applied.description: T057 max2+GR24 - added MAX2 gm=0, baseline=mutant, expected=unchanged
fixes_applied.reason: Trap 5 (signaling mutant rescue) - max2 receptor KO blocks SL response
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Per BUILDER Â§14 TRAP 5: Signaling/receptor mutant + exogenous hormone = unchanged (NOT rescued)

fixes_applied.description: T059 brc1 brc2 +GR24 - added BRC1 gm=0, baseline=mutant, expected=unchanged
fixes_applied.reason: BRC1 downstream of SL; KO blocks SL pathway effect
fixes_applied.biological_justification: BRC1 is the SL signaling output node; without BRC1, SL cannot affect branching via this cascade

fixes_applied.description: T096 d14+GR24 - added D14 gm=0, baseline=mutant, expected=unchanged
fixes_applied.biological_justification: D14 receptor KO blocks SL response

fixes_applied.description: T142 max3 KO expected unchanged -> increased
fixes_applied.reason: max3 (CCD7) is the canonical SL biosynthesis overbranching mutant
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Stirnberg 2002, Booker 2004 - max3 mutants show strongly increased shoot branching

fixes_applied.description: T132 SL biosynthesis mutant + GR24 expected increased -> decreased
fixes_applied.reason: Biosynthesis mutant rescue: exo hormone restores WT-like phenotype, baseline=mutant
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Per BUILDER encoding rules: biosynthesis mutant + hormone = decreased from mutant baseline

fixes_applied.reason: BRC2 is BRC1 paralog with partial redundancy
fixes_applied.biological_justification: BRC2 OE alone doesn't fully reproduce 2x BRC1 effect; intermediate modifier

fixes_applied.description: T129 smxl7 KO: expected decreased -> unchanged
fixes_applied.reason: Single SMXL7 KO from triple-redundant family
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Soundappan 2015 - only smxl6/7/8 triple KO shows branching phenotype

fixes_applied.description: T141 d14 KO: expected decreased -> increased
fixes_applied.reason: d14 is canonical SL receptor overbranching mutant
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Arite 2009 d14 mutants show massively increased tillering/branching

fixes_applied.description: T084 HB21 KO expected unchanged -> increased
fixes_applied.reason: Biology: HB21->NCED3->ABA cascade KO releases dormancy
BRC2 single-OE near-WT effect due to BRC1 dominance

remaining_failure_categories.T128: framework_limitation - cascade direction conflict (SMXL ⊣ BRC1 path predicts opposite of observed smxl678 triple KO phenotype; SMXL → PIN1 path may need to dominate)
remaining_failure_categories.T133: test_extraction_error - 'cytokinin knockout' is biologically nonsensical (CK is a hormone, not a gene); ratio 562 indicates ODE instability with hormone node forced to 0
